execute a typed Command Line alias
type the first letter of the Polyline alias
after P, type the letter that completes the Polyline alias
type the first letter of the Ellipse alias
after E, type the letter that completes the Ellipse alias
type the first letter of the Rectangle alias
after R, type the second letter of the Rectangle alias
after RE, type the letter that completes the Rectangle alias (distinguishing it from Regen)
type the first letter of the Spline alias
after S, type the second letter of the Spline alias
after SP, type the letter that completes the Spline alias
type the first letter of the Polygon alias
after P, type the second letter of the Polygon alias
after PO, type the letter that completes the Polygon alias

after X, type the letter that completes the Construction Line alias

after D, type the letter that completes the Donut alias

after B, type the letter that completes the Boundary alias

type the prefix key that all dimension command aliases begin with
after D, type the letter that begins the Linear Dimension alias
after DL, type the letter that completes the Linear Dimension alias
after D, type the letter shared by both the Aligned and Angular Dimension aliases
after DA, type the letter that completes the Aligned Dimension alias
after DA, type the letter that completes the Angular Dimension alias
after D, type the letter that begins the Radius Dimension alias
after DR, type the letter that completes the Radius Dimension alias
after D, type the repeated letter shared by the Diameter and Disassociate dimension aliases
after DD, type the letter that completes the Diameter Dimension alias
after DD, type the letter that completes the Disassociate Dimension alias
after D, type the letter that begins the Continue Dimension alias
after DC, type the letter that completes the Continue Dimension alias
after D, type the letter that begins the Baseline Dimension alias
after DB, type the letter that completes the Baseline Dimension alias
after starting Zoom, type this letter to fit the drawing limits
after starting Zoom, type this letter to fit all visible geometry

after starting Zoom, type this letter to restore the previous viewport
after starting Zoom, type this letter to zoom to a selected object
